shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth. Do not redraw Hatch from prompt-only instructions or change his required traits.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into three-page validation scene

assets.caption: Three pages. No scheduling code. One demand question at a time.
assets.prompt: Flat geometric HackProduct hero illustration for Buffer landing page validation. Official Hatch mascot used as strict character reference and integrated as a narrator pointing at the pricing step. Three page panels show product description, pricing test, and email capture.
